introSection: Wild Mouse was a steel hybrid wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Chippewa Lake Park in Chippewa Lake, Ohio, USA. The ride remained standing but not operating for several decades after the park's closure. It was reportedly demolished in 2009.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Wild Mouse originally opened at Geauga Lake around 1958 and was later relocated to Chippewa Lake Park around 1970.

fullText:
Wild Mouse was a steel hybrid wild mouse roller coaster previously located at Chippewa Lake Park in Chippewa Lake, Ohio, USA. The ride remained standing but not operating for several decades after the park's closure. It was reportedly demolished in 2009.

Wild Mouse originally opened at Geauga Lake around 1958 and was later relocated to Chippewa Lake Park around 1970.
